title: salix × gemmia
intro: Salix × gemmia, also known as the hybrid willow, is a plant that results from the cross-breeding of two different willow species, typically Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of Salix × gemmia contain salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Salix × gemmia include relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, headaches, and minor wounds.
